column4: - High school I went to, cheered at, and met my best friends.
- Favorite restaurant to go to with my high school friends. Cheap, great service, great food. Cute & quiant
-Church I grew up in, shaped me into who I am. A place of comfort. Met so many great people and friends.
-Place I went to workout with friends, tan at the pool, or walk on the tredmill and yap.
-My parents practically live at this grocery store. Studying with friends, getting a late-night snack, or picking up something on the way to school. Spent a lot of time and money here.
-My favorite midwest coffee place. It is super close to my house and my friends and I would go here a lot. Has the best coffee and nice workers.
-Where all of our football, soccer, and lacrosse games were. I was a cheerleader, so I spent lots of time on the sidelines. It was always a fun night at Kuhlman.
-Very grateful to have grew up going here in the summers learning golf, tennis, and swim, meeting lifelong friends. Beautfiul view of Lake Calhun.
-Where all my high school friends gather during breaks from college. Good memories made here, cheap food and drink.
